# CASE STUDY: **Best daily revenue** for coach-client using only ONE email campaign.

**PART 1: The Problem**

This was a project for a coaching client who sells a $997 course on how to write, publish and write a book. 

Prior to implementing my email campaign, he was earning around $1500 to $5000 per week primarily using FB ads, Instagram posts, and Live webinar pitches. 

He had a list of 7000 people on his email list, however, it was severely underutilized. 

In fact, most of the people on the list had become inactive.

**PART 2: The Result**

I came in and set up a “Comeback” sequence creating the best revenue generated from the list in long while.

Here are sales Before and during the “Comeback” email campaign.

The spike you see is what happened when we instituted the comeback sequence. 

![][image1]

The single email send resulted in **$5k sales in one day**\! 

However, this result doesn’t exist in a vacuum. Eugene continually maximizes his overall sales post comeback sequence. 

As of this last quarter of the year 2021, he’s already earning 5 figures a week with the help of my emails (together with other marketing strategies)

**PART 3: The Solution**

Alright\! Here are the emails in my “Comeback” email sequence. (NOTE: for obvious reasons, I covered the names and other private info for the emails)

1\. 1st Email – For indoctrination. Notice how I said “Congratulations” in the subject line. It’s because since we haven’t reached out to the list for a long time, we needed to “surprise” our subscribers with something that would make them OPEN our email.

I also incorporated the concept of reciprocity, authority, liking, exclusivity, commitment, radical transparency, and consistency.

![][image2]

![][image3]

![][image4]

2\. 2nd Email – Keeping the Promise from the previous email. We want to be consistent with our promises so this email solidifies the promise we made in the previous email. 

![][image5]

![][image6]

![][image7]

3\. Last Email for this sequence. Testimonial email. 

The PS in this email opens up to connect with the next email sequence. Since it was November at the time, we decided to pair up this “Comeback” email sequence with the “Black Friday” email sequence.

![][image8]

This “Comeback” email sequence allowed us to REVIVE old subscribers as well as get rid of unnecessary subscriptions that are no longer interested in the offer.

With this pre-framing done, we were ready to proceed with our next email sequences which proved to be very effective in adding additional revenue. 

At first, he thought emails were just for promotions and reminders. After I gave him the results, he said to me*, “I never knew how important emails were”* 

Which is why until today, he continually uses my email sequences for various campaigns to earn his 5-figure weekly income\!
